parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: ($('Guardrails').item.json.safe_text || $('Normalize').item.json.prompt), dept_id: $('Normalize').item.json.dept_id, task_type: $('Normalize').item.json.task_type, threshold: 0.88, contains_sensitive_data: ($('Guardrails').item.json.contains_sensitive_data || false) }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const opt = $('Optimizer').item.json;
const norm = $('Normalize').item.json;
const guard = $('Guardrails').item.json;
let img = { class: 'unknown', confidence: 0, visual_complexity: 0, needs_vision_model: false };
try {
  const items = $items('Image Analyser');
  if (items && items.length) img = items[0].json;
} catch (e) {}
const userPrompt = (guard.safe_text || norm.prompt || '').trim();
const promptLine = userPrompt ? ('User prompt: ' + userPrompt + '\n\n') : '';
const answer = promptLine +
  'MomiHelm image analysis (PyTorch ResNet18):\n' +
  '- Class: ' + img.class + ' (confidence ' + img.confidence + ')\n' +
  '- Visual complexity: ' + img.visual_complexity + '\n' +
  '- Needs vision model: ' + img.needs_vision_model + '\n' +
  '- MomiHelm routed this request to the vision tier.\n' +
  '- Multimodal model execution is not available in this MVP; classification ran locally in image-analyser-service.';
const inStatus = guard.requires_redaction ? 'passed_with_redaction' : 'passed';
return [{ json: {
  answer: answer,
  receipt: {
    guardrail_status: inStatus,
    output_guardrail_status: 'skipped',
    output_guardrail_issues: [],
    cache_status: 'skipped',
    cache_confidence: 0,
    cache_entry_id: null,
    selected_tier: 'vision',
    estimated_tokens: opt.estimated_tokens,
    estimated_cost: opt.estimated_cost,
    optimization_reason: opt.optimization_reason,
    cost_saved: opt.cost_saved,
    detected_risk_type: guard.detected_risk_type || null,
    reason: guard.reason || 'passed',
    savings_source: 'image_analysis',
    savings_reason: 'pytorch_classification_routed_to_vision',
    task_type: opt.task_type,
    complexity_score: opt.complexity_score,
    complexity_level: opt.complexity_level,
    compression_recommended: opt.compression_recommended,
    compression_target_ratio: opt.compression_target_ratio,
    compression_reason: opt.compression_reason,
    compression_risk: opt.compression_risk,
    fallback_tier: opt.fallback_tier,
    estimated_baseline_cost: opt.estimated_baseline_cost,
    estimated_optimized_cost: opt.estimated_optimized_cost,
    decision_reasons: opt.decision_reasons || [],
    graph_path: opt.graph_path,
    branch_reason: opt.branch_reason,
    executed_nodes: opt.executed_nodes || [],
    provider: 'image-analyser-service',
    model: 'resnet18',
    requested_tier: 'vision',
    executed_tier: 'vision',
    has_image: true,
    image_class: img.class,
    image_filename: norm.image_filename,
    image_confidence: img.confidence,
    visual_complexity: img.visual_complexity,
    needs_vision_model: img.needs_vision_model
  }
} }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('Normalize').item.json.request_id, prompt: ($('Guardrails').item.json.safe_text || $('Normalize').item.json.prompt), selected_tier: $('Optimizer').item.json.selected_tier, fallback_tier: $('Optimizer').item.json.fallback_tier, policy_mode: $('Normalize').item.json.policy_mode, contains_sensitive_data: ($('Guardrails').item.json.contains_sensitive_data || false), require_local_model: ($('Guardrails').item.json.require_local_model || false), allow_external_model: ($('Guardrails').item.json.allow_external_model !== false), prompt_redaction_applied: ($('Guardrails').item.json.requires_redaction || false), estimated_tokens: $('Optimizer').item.json.estimated_tokens, estimated_baseline_cost: $('Optimizer').item.json.estimated_baseline_cost, estimated_optimized_cost: $('Optimizer').item.json.estimated_optimized_cost, optimization_plan: $('Optimizer').item.json.optimization_plan, runtime_facts: { guardrail_status: 'passed', cache_status: 'miss', graph_path: $('Optimizer').item.json.graph_path, task_type: $('Optimizer').item.json.task_type, complexity_level: $('Optimizer').item.json.complexity_level, complexity_score: $('Optimizer').item.json.complexity_score, privacy_enforced: ($('Guardrails').item.json.require_local_model || false), selected_tier: $('Optimizer').item.json.selected_tier } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const pe = $json;
const opt = $('Optimizer').item.json;
const norm = $('Normalize').item.json;
const guard = $('Guardrails').item.json;
const message = pe.error_message || pe.error_code || 'unknown error';
return [{ json: {
  answer: 'Provider execution failed: ' + message,
  receipt: {
    policy_mode: norm.policy_mode,
    guardrail_status: guard.requires_redaction ? 'passed_with_redaction' : 'passed',
    output_guardrail_status: 'skipped',
    output_guardrail_issues: [],
    cache_status: 'miss',
    cache_confidence: 0,
    cache_entry_id: null,
    selected_tier: pe.requested_tier || opt.selected_tier || 'none',
    estimated_tokens: opt.estimated_tokens || 0,
    estimated_cost: opt.estimated_cost || 0,
    optimization_reason: 'Provider execution failed: ' + message,
    cost_saved: 0,
    detected_risk_type: guard.detected_risk_type || null,
    reason: 'provider_execution_failed',
    provider: pe.provider || 'none',
    model: pe.model || '-',
    requested_tier: pe.requested_tier || opt.selected_tier || 'none',
    executed_tier: pe.executed_tier || 'none',
    error_code: pe.error_code || 'PROVIDER_EXECUTION_FAILED',
    provider_attempts: (pe.attempts || []).map(a => a.provider + '/' + a.tier + ' ' + (a.attempt_role || 'primary') + (a.executed ? ' executed' : ' skipped') + (a.success ? ' ok' : ' fail:' + a.error_code)),
    actual_execution_attempt_count: pe.actual_execution_attempt_count || 0,
    actual_cost: 0,
    actual_cost_saved: 0,
    used_fallback: pe.used_fallback || false,
    fallback_reason: pe.fallback_reason || null,
    privacy_enforced: pe.privacy_enforced || guard.require_local_model || false,
    prompt_redaction_applied: pe.prompt_redaction_applied || guard.requires_redaction || false,
    estimated_baseline_cost: opt.estimated_baseline_cost || 0,
    estimated_optimized_cost: opt.estimated_optimized_cost || 0,
    savings_source: 'model_routing',
    savings_reason: 'provider_failed'
  }
} }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: ($('Guardrails').item.json.safe_text || $('Normalize').item.json.prompt), answer: ($json.redacted_text || $('Provider Execute').item.json.answer), dept_id: $('Normalize').item.json.dept_id, task_type: $('Normalize').item.json.task_type, contains_sensitive_data: ($('Guardrails').item.json.contains_sensitive_data || false), output_guardrail_passed: ($json.pass !== false) }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prep = $('Prepare Usage Log').item.json;
return [{ json: { answer: prep.answer, receipt: prep.receipt } }];
